general.label: General
general.title: General Settings
general.server_port_change: The listening port has been changed, Please restart the application for the changes to take effect
general.proxy_change: The proxy has been changed, Restart the application for the changes to take effect
general.proxy_error: Please fill in the host and port

ai.label: AI
ai.empty: No AI service configured. Add one to get started.

audio.label: Audio
audio.title: Soniox - Real-time Audio Translation
audio.info_desc: Soniox provides real-time speech-to-text with built-in translation. Supports microphone and system audio.
audio.tts_hint: Start the TTS server before enabling playback. VieNeu: run `vieneu-stream` (port 8001). OpenAI-compatible: any server supporting POST /v1/audio/speech. Google: no server needed.
audio.tts_active_service_hint: Configure each TTS service in the TTS tab.
audio.tts_playback_rate_hint: When the queue has backlog, speed increases automatically (×1.5 / ×2.0 / ×2.5 of this base value).
audio.tts_edge_builtin_hint: No server required — runs directly inside Transkit
audio.soniox_endpoint_delay_hint: How long Soniox waits for more audio before finalizing a segment. Lower = faster response, higher = more accurate sentences.
audio.soniox_batch_interval_hint: How often audio chunks are sent to Soniox. Lower = lower latency, higher = fewer network calls.
audio.soniox_speaker_diarization_hint: Identify and label different speakers. Disable to reduce latency.
audio.stt_active_service_hint: Configure providers in Services → Transcription tab.
audio.autosave_enable_hint: When enabled, the monitor window will automatically save transcripts to a Markdown file (~/Documents/TransKit/) each session. You can toggle this at any time in the monitor window.
audio.ai_suggestion_no_service: No AI service configured. Add one in Settings > Service > AI
audio.ai_suggestion_response_lang_hint: Language used in Research and Suggested Answer sections.
audio.ai_suggestion_context_lines_hint: Number of previous conversation lines sent to AI for context.

account.label: Account
account.title: Account
account.sign_in_description: Sign in to sync your profile and data across devices.
account.upgrade_cta_trial: Upgrade for more TTS, AI, and translation quota
account.upgrade_cta_starter: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited access
account.powered_by_note: AI & Translation: Gemini 2.5 Flash · TTS: ElevenLabs
account.subscription_ended: Subscription ended. Your plan will be updated shortly.
account.session_expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

backup.label: Backup
backup.title: Backup Settings
backup.aliyun_login_first: Please scan the code to log in first.
backup.empty: You have not backed up yet

profile.label: Profile
profile.title: User Profile
profile.hint: Your profile helps AI Suggestion generate more relevant, personalized responses.
profile.name: Full Name
profile.expertise_placeholder: e.g. Fintech, AI, Healthcare — press Enter or comma
profile.expertise_hint: These domains help AI tailor suggestions to your background.
profile.notes_placeholder: e.g. I attend English-speaking meetings but prefer answers in Vietnamese

voice_input.label: Voice Anywhere
voice_input.title: Voice Anywhere Settings
voice_input.action_desc: Clipboard: copy text only. Paste: re-focus the last app and paste automatically.
voice_input.inject_mode_desc: Replace: clears existing text. Append: adds after current text.
voice_input.autostart_desc: Immediately begin recording when the hotkey is pressed.
voice_input.sfx_enabled_desc: Play an audio cue when recording starts or stops.
voice_input.always_visible_desc: Keep the mic button on screen at all times. No hotkey needed.
voice_input.show_context_menu_desc: Enable right-click on the Voice Anywhere button to open provider and action shortcuts.
voice_input.prefer_async_api: Use async STT API when available
voice_input.prefer_async_api_desc: Recommended for dictation. Voice Anywhere records continuously until you stop, then sends the full audio to supported providers and falls back to realtime when unsupported.
voice_input.polish_enabled_desc: Pass the transcript through an AI service before injecting or pasting.
voice_input.polish_level_desc: Mild: fix errors only. Medium: improve fluency. Aggressive: restructure and format.
voice_input.polish_service_desc: AI provider used for polishing. Configure providers in Settings → AI Services.
voice_input.idle_button_color_desc: Choose the standby color for the Voice Anywhere button.

local_sidecar.label: Local Model
local_sidecar.title: Local Model
local_sidecar.subtitle: Run AI models locally, no internet required

setup.title: Environment
setup.requirements: Requires macOS Apple Silicon · ~3 GB disk · Python 3.10+ (brew install python3)

startup.title: Startup
startup.enable_hint: Start the inference server when Transkit launches

llm.temperature_hint: Lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative

offline_stt_translate.service_hint: After speech is recognized, translate the transcript to the target language. Uses the target language configured in Monitor / Voice Anywhere.

model.active_hint: HuggingFace repo ID of the downloaded model
model.download_hint: Enter a HuggingFace repo ID for a Zipformer RNNT ONNX model.
model.active_readonly: Active model (managed in Local Models settings)
model.no_model: No model selected — configure in Settings → Local Models

server.title: ONNX Server
server.no_model_warning: No model downloaded yet. Download a model in the Models section below before starting the server.

startup.enable_hint: Automatically start the ONNX server when Transkit launches if a downloaded model is available.

onnx_stt.manage_in_settings: Manage engine and models in Settings → Local Models
onnx_stt.usage_hint: To use ONNX speech recognition, go to Settings → Services → Transcription and add an "Offline STT (ONNX)" service instance.

monitor.placeholder_context_hint: For specialized topics, click the Settings (⚙) button to configure translation context for better accuracy.
monitor.no_api_key: Please set your API key in Settings › {{service}} › {{transcription}}
monitor.ctx_domain_placeholder: Topic context (e.g. Web3 conference, medical talk...)
monitor.ctx_terms_placeholder: Key terms, comma-separated (e.g. TransKit, Soniox, API)
monitor.ctx_text_placeholder: Background narrative or reference text for this session...
monitor.ctx_ai_placeholder: Describe the topic (e.g. medical consultation about diabetes...)
monitor.ctx_ai_no_service: No AI service configured. Add one in Settings > Service > AI
monitor.ctx_char_limit_warning: Context is close to the 10,000 character limit
monitor.autosave_on: Auto-save is ON — click to disable
monitor.autosave_off: Auto-save is OFF — click to enable
monitor.autosave_clear_blocked: Cannot clear while recording with auto-save on. Stop first to save the file.
monitor.ai_suggestion_hint: Get AI suggestion for this line
monitor.ai_suggestion_error: AI suggestion failed. Check your AI service settings.
monitor.ai_suggestion_no_service: No AI service configured for suggestions. Go to Settings > Audio Translate.
monitor.narration_ptt_requires_fixed_source: PTT reverse mode needs a fixed Source language (not Auto). Example: Japanese → Vietnamese.
monitor.narration_ptt_cost_warning: PTT Active may create an extra STT cloud stream while pressed and can consume duplicate token/minutes.
monitor.quota_exceeded_title: Transkit Cloud quota reached ({{used}}/{{limit}} min used).
monitor.quota_action_byok: Or use your own API key: Settings › {{service}} › {{transcription}}
monitor.auth_lock_conflict_hint: Multiple requests competed for the auth token at the same time. Click Start to retry.
monitor.ci_hint: Click ✨ on any line to run AI analysis
monitor.narration_test_tone_title: Send 440 Hz test tone to virtual device
monitor.narration_checklist_item2: ② Mute your real mic in Zoom (participants hear {{device}}, not your real mic)
monitor.narration_checklist_item3: ③ Press & hold "Hold to Speak" to narrate
monitor.narration_win_zoom_hint: After install & reboot, select "CABLE Output" as mic in Zoom/Teams.

updater.title: Check Update
updater.installed: Install completed, Restart the application for the changes to take effect

ollama.title: Ollama
ollama.install_ollama: Unable to connect to local ollama, please download, install and start ollama first. If you use ollama that is not on this machine, please change the request address.
ollama.not_installed: This model has not been installed yet, click to download and install now
ollama.supported_models: Click to see a list of Ollama available models
ollama.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of AI. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.

openai.title: OpenAI
openai.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of OpenAI. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.

geminipro.title: Gemini
geminipro.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of Gemini Pro. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.

openrouter.title: OpenRouter
openrouter.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of OpenRouter. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.

groq.title: Groq
groq.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of Groq. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.

chatglm.title: ChatGLM
chatglm.prompt_description: By customizing the Prompt, you can customize the behavior of AI. $text $from $to $detect will be replaced with the text to be translated, source language, target language and detected language.

transkit_cloud_translate.title: Transkit Cloud
transkit_cloud_translate.sign_in_desc: Sign in to use Transkit Cloud Translation — no API key needed.
transkit_cloud_translate.powered_by_note: Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash. Model may be updated for quality improvements.
transkit_cloud_translate.not_available: Transkit Cloud is not available in this build.

local_sidecar.title: Local Model
local_sidecar.hint: Uses the Local Model LLM for translation. Configure the model in Settings → Local Model.

edge_tts.title: Microsoft Edge TTS
edge_tts.builtin_hint: No server required — runs directly inside Transkit

transkit_cloud_tts.title: Transkit Cloud
transkit_cloud_tts.sign_in_desc: Sign in to use Transkit Cloud TTS — no API key needed. Your plan includes free trial characters.
transkit_cloud_tts.auto_provider_note: The active TTS provider is configured by Transkit and may change to deliver the best quality.
transkit_cloud_tts.not_available: Transkit Cloud is not available in this build.

google_cloud_tts.title: Google Cloud TTS (Chirp3-HD)
google_cloud_tts.api_key_hint_enable: enable Cloud Text-to-Speech API, then create an API key.

openai_compat_ai.title: OpenAI Compatible AI
openai_compat_ai.system_prompt_hint: Guides the AI behavior. Use for summarization, translation context, etc.

transkit_cloud_ai.title: Transkit Cloud AI
transkit_cloud_ai.sign_in_desc: Sign in to use Transkit Cloud AI — no API key needed. Your plan includes free AI suggestion requests.
transkit_cloud_ai.powered_by_note: Powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash. Model may be updated for quality improvements.
transkit_cloud_ai.not_available: Transkit Cloud is not available in this build.

local_sidecar_ai.title: Offline AI (MLX)
local_sidecar_ai.hint: Uses the Local Model LLM for AI analysis. Configure the model in Settings → Local Model.

custom_stt.title: Custom STT Provider
custom_stt.api_key_hint: Sent as api_key in the connection config message.
custom_stt.endpoint_delay_hint: How long the provider waits for more audio before finalizing a segment.
custom_stt.batch_interval_hint: How often audio chunks are sent. Lower = lower latency, higher = fewer network calls.
custom_stt.speaker_diarization_hint: Identify and label different speakers. Disable to reduce latency.

soniox_stt.title: Soniox
soniox_stt.endpoint_delay_hint: How long Soniox waits for more audio before finalizing a segment. Lower = faster response, higher = more accurate sentences.
soniox_stt.batch_interval_hint: How often audio chunks are sent to Soniox. Lower = lower latency, higher = fewer network calls.
soniox_stt.speaker_diarization_hint: Identify and label different speakers. Disable to reduce latency.

assemblyai_stt.title: AssemblyAI
assemblyai_stt.no_translation_note: Note: AssemblyAI real-time API does not support built-in translation. The transcript will be shown as both source and translated text.

openai_whisper_stt.title: OpenAI Whisper
openai_whisper_stt.chunk_interval_hint: Audio is buffered and sent to Whisper every N seconds. Lower = more responsive, higher = more accurate.
openai_whisper_stt.batch_note: Whisper is a batch API. Audio is sent in chunks, so there will be latency between speech and transcript.

gladia_stt.title: Gladia
gladia_stt.endpointing_hint: Silence duration that triggers end of an utterance. Lower = faster response, higher = more complete sentences. Recommended: 0.1s for live captions.
gladia_stt.speech_threshold_hint: Minimum confidence to consider audio as speech (0–1). Lower = more sensitive, higher = less noise pickup.
gladia_stt.batch_interval_hint: How often audio chunks are sent to Gladia. Lower = lower latency, higher = fewer network calls.

deepgram_stt.title: Deepgram
deepgram_stt.google_api_key_hint: Enable the Cloud Translation API and create a key at
deepgram_stt.google_api_key_optional: Leave blank to skip translation (transcript only).
deepgram_stt.endpointing_hint: Silence duration (ms) that triggers end of an utterance. Lower = faster splits, higher = more complete sentences. Recommended: 100ms.
deepgram_stt.batch_interval_hint: How often audio chunks are sent to Deepgram. Lower = lower latency, higher = fewer network calls.
deepgram_stt.provisional_timeout_hint: If no new transcript arrives within this duration, the pending text is committed automatically. Prevents text getting stuck at end of speech.
deepgram_stt.speaker_diarization_hint: Identify and label different speakers. Disable to reduce latency.

transkit_cloud_stt.title: Transkit Cloud STT
transkit_cloud_stt.sign_in_desc: Sign in to use Transkit Cloud STT — no API key needed. Your plan includes free trial minutes and automatically uses the best available provider.
transkit_cloud_stt.quota_reached_hint: or add a personal API key in another STT provider.
transkit_cloud_stt.auto_provider_note: The active STT provider is configured by Transkit and may change at any time to deliver the best quality. You do not need to manage any API keys.
transkit_cloud_stt.not_available: Transkit Cloud is not available in this build.
transkit_cloud_stt.endpointing_hint: Silence duration that triggers utterance completion. Lower = faster response, higher = more complete sentences. Applied when the active provider supports it.
transkit_cloud_stt.speech_threshold_hint: Minimum confidence to detect speech activity. Higher = fewer false triggers. Applied when the active provider supports it.

transkit_cloud_dictation.title: Transkit Cloud Dictation
transkit_cloud_dictation.sign_in_desc: Sign in to use Cloud Dictation — optimised for short push-to-talk sessions (Voice Anywhere, Narration PTT). No API key needed.
